entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00089) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00089 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD AND EXERCISE CLIN 3028AD "CASE MANAGEMENT IPT MEETINGS," TO PROVIDE CASE MANAGEMENT INTEGRATED PROJECT TEAM (IPT) MEETING SUPPORT THROUGH JANUARY 1, 2014, AS WELL AS INCORPORATE ITS ASSOCIATED STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW) INTO THE IDIQ.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00090) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00090 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD AND EXERCISE CLINS 3028AE "OOI HOTLINE APPLICATION - DELTA REQUIREMENTS" AND 5028B "HOTLINE LEGACY DATA MIGRATION," AS WELL AS INCORPORATE THE ASSOCIATED STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW).
TESTING AND DEPLOYMENT OF BOTH THE ORIGINAL AND DELTA HOTLINE REQUIREMENTS SHALL TAKE PLACE UNDER CLIN 3028AC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00091) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00091 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) OF SUB-CLINS 4024B, 4024C, 4024D, AND 4024E IN SUPPORT OF THE INTEGRATED DATA WAREHOUSE (IDW) AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT. UNEXPENDED FUNDING FROM SUB-CLINS 4024B, 4024C, 4024D, AND 4024E IN THE AMOUNT NOT-TO-EXCEED (NTE) $503,192.00 WILL BE UTILIZED TO COVER THIS EXTENSION. CLAUSE I.3 LIMITATION OF COST AND I.4 LIMITATION OF FUNDS APPLY. THE CONTRACT IS MODIFIED AS FOLLOWS:
14(A) THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR SUB-CLIN 4024B IS REVISED FROM 3/1/13 - 4/30/13 TO 3/1/13 - 9/24/13.
14(B) THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR SUB-CLIN 4024C IS REVISED FROM 5/1/13 - 6/30/13 TO 5/1/13 - 9/24/13.
14(C)THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR SUB-CLIN 4024D IS REVISED FROM 7/1/13 - 7/31/13 TO 7/1/13 - 9/24/13.
14(D)THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR SUB-CLIN 4024E IS REVISED FROM 8/1/13 - 8/31/13 TO 8/1/13 - 9/24/13.
14(E) MODIFICATION P00029 WILL BE MADE TO TASK ORDER HSTS01-12-J-HRM040 TO REVISE THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE OF SUB-CLINS 4024B, 4024C, 4024D, AND 4024E AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT UNLESS OTHERWISE CHANGED BY THE HRACCESS CONTRACTING OFFICER.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00092) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00092 AGAINST INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE THE QUANTITY ASSOCIATED WITH CLIN 5004CB IN ORDER TO CORRECT A ROUNDING ERROR, AS WELL AS REALLOCATE FUNDING FROM SUB-CLIN 5002B TO NEWLY CREATED, OPTIONAL SUB-CLIN 5002BA, AND SUB-CLIN 5004CB TO NEWLY CREATED, OPTIONAL SUB-CLIN 5004CB-1 TO ENSURE THAT ONLY THE ESTIMATED PROJECTIONS THROUGH THE END OF THE CURRENT PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE ARE FUNDED. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO EXERCISES SUB-CLINS 5002B "RECRUITMENT ACTIVITIES (COST ONLY)," 5004CB "POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT," AND 5015AA "SF-52&BENEFITS PROCESSING (175,001 - 200,000)."

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00093) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00093 TO THE HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) ASSOCIATED WITH CLINS 3028AC, 3028AE, 5028B, AND 5028B-1 AT NO COST TO THE GOVERNMENT, TO ELIMINATE THE NEED FOR THE TRANSPORTATION SECURITY ADMINISTRATION (TSA) TO OPERATE THE LEGACY AND NEW HOTLINE SYSTEMS SIMULTANEOUSLY. WITH THE EXECUTION OF THIS MODIFICATION, THE HOTLINE AND DELTA HOTLINE REQUIREMENTS WILL BE WORKED IN PARALLEL WITH THE MIGRATION OF THE HOTLINE LEGACY DATA RATHER THAN SEQUENTIALLY AS INITIALLY AWARDED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00094) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00094 TO THE HRACCESS IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS AS FOLLOWS:
14(A) TO CREATE CLIN 5024 DATA WAREHOUSE OY 4 AT A COST OF $2,493,618.88 AND FIXED FEE OF $239,446.15. THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE (POP) FOR THIS CLIN IS 9/25/13 - 1/1/14.
14(B) TO EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 5005AB "BACKGROUND CHECK" FOR $167,950.00.
14(C) TO CREATE OPTIONAL SUB-CLIN 5024-1 "FIXED FEE ON IDW O&M BID AND PROPOSAL (B&P) COSTS" FOR $1,817.03.
14(D) MODIFICATION P00008 WILL BE MADE TO THE OY 4 TASK ORDER HSTS01-13-J-HRM022 TO EXERCISE AND FULLY FUND SUB-CLIN 5005AB IN THE AMOUNT OF $167,950.00. MODIFICATION P00008 WILL ALSO EXERCISE AND FULLY FUND CLIN 5024 IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,733,065.03(COST: $2,493,618.88; FIXED FEE: $239,446.15). THE TOTAL OBLIGATION ON MODIFICATION P00008 WILL BE $2,901,015.03.
14(E) TO INCORPORATE AN UPDATED SECTION 12 OF THE STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW). THE ATTACHED REPLACES THE CURRENT SECTION 12 OF THE SOW IN ITS ENTIRETY. PLEASE SEE SECTION 14(G) ON PAGE 3.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT REMAIN UNCHANGED AND IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT UNLESS OTHERWISE CHANGED BY THE HRACCESS CONTRACTING OFFICER.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00095) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00095 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO: 1.) ADD AND EXERCISE CLINS 5029 "CASE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM - DESIGN AND DEVELOPMENT," 5029A "UDRS - DESIGN AND DEVELOPMENT," 5030 "CASE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM - TESTING AND DEPLOYMENT," 5030A "UDRS TESTING AND DEPLOYMENT," 5031 "BI-WEEKLY CASE MANAGEMENT IPT MEETING;" 2.) ADD OPTIONAL SUB-CLINS 5029A-1 "UDRS - DESIGN AND DEVELOPMENT DELTA FIXED FEE," 5031A "OPTION PERIOD 5 - BI-WEEKLY CASE MANAGEMENT IPT MEETING;" 5031B "OPTION PERIOD 6 - BI-WEEKLY CASE MANAGEMENT IPT MEETING" AND 5031C "OPTION PERIOD 7 - BI-WEEKLY CASE MANAGEMENT IPT MEETING;" 3.) INCORPORATE THE UNITARY DISPUTE RESOLUTION SYSTEM (UDRS) STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW); AND 4.) IDENTIFY THE "CORE" INTEGRATED PROJECT TEAM (IPT) MEETING ATTENDEES FOR OPTION PERIODS 5-7.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00096) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00095 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD AND EXERCISE SUB-CLIN 5021AA-1 "O&M FOR DELTA REQUIREMENTS (EXECUTIVE DASHBOARD / OOI / OPR)" TO PROVIDE DELTA OFFICE OF INSPECTION (OOI), OFFICE OF PROFESSIONAL RESPONSIBILITY (OPR), AND EXECUTIVE DASHBOARD OPERATIONS&MAINTENANCE (O&M) ABOVE THE FOUR (4) DR/CRS PER QUARTER CURRENTLY ON CONTRACT UNDER CLIN 5021AA FOR THE COMPLETION OF 15 DRS AND CONTINUED O&M SUPPORT THROUGH THE END OF OPTION PERIOD 4. ADDITIONALLY, THIS MODIFICATION ADDS OPTIONAL SUB-CLIN 5021AA-2 "O&M FOR DELTA REQUIREMENTS (EXECUTIVE DASHBOARD / OOI / OPR) DELTA FIXED FEE," AND INCORPORATES LM'S DEFINITION OF O&M SERVICES INTO THE STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW) FOR THIS ACTION ONLY.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00097) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF ZERO DOLLAR, ADMINISTRATIVE MODIFICATION P00097 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE SUB-CLIN 5021AA-1 TO MAKE IT COST PLUS FIXED FEE COMPLETION FORM, AS IT WAS ERRONEOUSLY IDENTIFIED AS COST ONLY IN P00096. THIS MODIFICATION WILL ALSO REPLACE ALL REFERENCES TO THE ADDITION OF CLIN 5021AA-2 WITH 5021AA-1A "O&M FOR DELTA REQUIREMENTS (EXECUTIVE DASHBOARD / OOI / OPR) DELTA FIXED FEE," AS THIS CLIN WAS ERRONEOUSLY IDENTIFIED IN MODIFICATION P00096.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00098) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00098 TO HRACCESS INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO:
1.) RESCIND THE VERBAL STOP WORK ORDER ISSUED ON OCTOBER 8, 2013 FOR OOI INVESTIGATIONS LEGACY DATA MIGRATION;
2.) AUTHORIZE ADDITIONAL FUNDING FOR THE COMPLETION OF TESTING AND DEPLOYMENT ACTIVITIES; AND
3.) EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FOR THE OVERALL EFFORT THROUGH NOVEMBER 30, 2013.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
